name: Keyword & Rankings Audit
ga4_status: Not available — fallback to GSC + SE Ranking as per init note

seranking_trend.assessment: Improving trajectory — top-3 grew by 40%, not-ranking shrank by 75%

current_rankings_summary.critical_note: SE Ranking shows 'local_pack' as the primary ranking type for most tracked keywords. These are Google Business Profile / Maps positions, NOT organic website rankings. The actual organic ranking footprint is significantly smaller than SE Ranking suggests.

key_ranking_movers.note: Strong upward movement — approaching page 1. Needs continued content investment to reach top 10.
Just entered rankings — very high volume keyword. Position 70-80 is too low for meaningful traffic but signals the page has some relevance.
Homepage targeting 'cash loans' nationally — broad, competitive. Local modifier needed.
No dedicated page for this keyword — opportunity to create /loans/same-day-loans/

competitor_comparison.context: Surecash's organic ETV is a fraction of key competitors. This gap is partly structural (Nimble, CashTrain are purely online lenders with larger budgets), but there are clear on-page and content gaps contributing to the underperformance.

primary_keywords.status: H1 says 'Cash Loans in Sydney' — correctly targets local. Position ~70-80 nationally. Improving.
Page exists, new entry at 70-80. Very competitive national term.
H1 is 'Payday Loans Australia' — correctly targeting national intent. Needs more content/authority.
Strong mover (+38 positions). Page well-optimised. Keep investing in content.
H1 and title correctly target. Position unknown but likely local pack via GBP.

keyword_gaps_no_page.action: Create /loans/same-day-loans/ — currently ranking at 70-80 without a dedicated page
Create /loans/emergency-loans/ — blog post exists but no product page
Create /loans/instant-loans/ or target via same-day-loans page
Can target via same-day or instant loans page
Create /loans/online-loans/ — major competitor term with no surecash presence
Bad credit loans page exists — may need targeting this variant
Could create informational blog content targeting users comparing options

branded_vs_non_branded.branded_share: ~70% of GSC traffic is branded (from init data)
branded_vs_non_branded.implication: 70% branded traffic suggests the site primarily converts people already looking for Sure Cash. Only ~30% is new organic discovery. For growth, this ratio needs to shift — more non-branded keyword rankings will expand the addressable audience.
branded_vs_non_branded.benchmark: Healthy e-commerce/finance sites typically aim for 50-60% branded or less

gsc_top_pages_organic_reality.note: The top 4 GSC pages by clicks are ALL 404 pages (old URLs). This distorts the picture.

actual_performing_pages_estimated.homepage: 2,822 clicks at avg pos 24 — primarily branded queries

gsc_top_pages_organic_reality.estimated_traffic_loss_from_404s: 1,410+ clicks/90 days (1,683/month annualised equivalent) being lost to 404 errors on migrated URLs

potential_issues.assessment: Moderate risk — homepage and Sydney page both target 'cash loans [city]'. Homepage has more authority but Sydney page is more specific. Should use canonical or ensure differentiation.

competing_pages: Multiple service area pages all targeting 'payday loans [city]' in title tags
potential_issues.assessment: The service area page title pattern ('Payday Loans, Loans for People on Centrelink, and Cash Loans in [City]') targets multiple keywords in one title. This dilutes signal focus.

url_structure_assessment.location_pages: /service-areas/[city]/ — GOOD for new URLs. Problem is old URLs (/gosford/, /centrelink-loans/) still in GSC with significant traffic.
url_structure_assessment.blog: Root-level slugs — ACCEPTABLE but mixing with product content at root level is non-ideal

issues_priority.issue: 1,410+ clicks/90d lost to 404 errors from URL migration without redirects
No dedicated page for 'same day loans' (6,600/mo) — site already ranking at 70-80 without one
No dedicated page for 'online loans' — major competitor term
70% branded traffic — organic discovery is limited
issues_priority.fix: Expand non-branded keyword targeting via new product pages and improved existing page rankings

issues_priority.issue: 'Loans on centrelink' at pos 42 with 22,200/mo volume — needs content push to break top 10
issues_priority.fix: Expand centrelink loans page: add benefit type breakdown, FAQ expansion, income threshold guidance

issues_priority.issue: Homepage targeting 'cash loans' at pos 70-80 — too broad nationally
issues_priority.fix: Strengthen with location modifier content, schema, and internal links from location pages

issues_priority.issue: Service area page titles use 3-keyword format in title tags (dilutes focus)
issues_priority.fix: Consolidate to single primary keyword per title: 'Cash Loans [City] | Sure Cash Finance'

issues_priority.issue: No emergency loans product page (blog post only)
